args.CodeContent:
"# Plant Pathology Q&A Seeding Task

## Phase 1: Content Extraction & Answer Writing
- [/] Section A — Extract questions from all 3 papers
- [/] Section A — Read slides and write answers
- [/] Section B — Extract questions from all 3 papers
- [/] Section B — Read slides and write answers

## Phase 2: Database Seeding
- [ ] Create seed_pathology.js with all topics, questions, answers
- [ ] Update Notes content for Section A
- [ ] Update Notes content for Section B
- [ ] Run seed script
- [ ] Verify database counts

## Phase 3: Website Verification
- [ ] Check Q&A page for Section A
- [ ] Check Q&A page for Section B
- [ ] Check Notes page for both sections
- [ ] Check PDF generation
- [ ] Check search functionality
- [ ] Delete stale PDFs for regeneration
"
